plot_direction.summary: A presumed-dead heiress returns under an alias to reclaim public legitimacy while a usurper holds the social crown; a disciplined investor becomes both weapon and romantic risk.
plot_direction.main_arc: Nora moves from hidden survival to public proof, forcing Celia's forged legitimacy to collapse in spectacle.

sub_arcs.label: Alliance under suspicion
sub_arcs.description: Adrian funds and protects Nora while tracing a deeper fraud network; trust is transactional until evidence aligns.

sub_arcs.label: Institutional block
sub_arcs.description: Board and legal gatekeepers slow truth drops; each win must be staged in public to bypass private capture.

key_turns.what_changes: Public humiliation reframes Nora as someone who can bite back without revealing the full identity.
Adrian enters as capital and narrative gravity; Nora accepts weaponized closeness.
Evidence chain completes; the final confrontation moves from private family myth to public legitimacy.

plot_direction.ending_tendency: Public reclamation of name and company; romance earned after truth is no longer leverageable against her.

story_structure.macro_structure: Launch: return + first reversals; Rise: stacked public wins and alliance pressure; Storm: betrayal beat and false defeat; Payoff: truth spectacle and institutional collapse.
story_structure.reveal_order: Identity clues precede full proof; donor and seal artifacts escalate; board fraud threads surface after social wins lock audience attention.
story_structure.pacing_notes: Each escalation prefers witnessed events; interior exposition minimized in favor of leverage shifts.

character_backgrounds.background: Raised inside the Hale legitimacy machine; staged disappearance erased her public existence while Celia consolidated acting-heiress status.
Built capital position tracing institutional fraud; entered the Hale war as investor with prior interest in the erased evidence chain.
Non-blood or contested lineage elevated by social performance; status depends on forged narratives and insider loyalty theater.

character_profiles.profile: Core desire: reclaim company and destroy the lie in public. Fear: being reduced to sentiment. Voice: cold precision under glamour. Leverage: lineage knowledge, hidden evidence, calm under humiliation.
Core desire: own truth before it is weaponized. Fear: being played. Voice: minimal, timing-based. Leverage: capital, legal reach, media gravity.
Core desire: permanent control of the empire. Fear: public unmasking. Voice: performative warmth. Leverage: image, insider networks, forged legitimacy artifacts.

relationships_and_turns.network_overview: Protagonist versus visible usurper with the male lead as volatile ally; institutional villains orbit as pressure, not primary emotional triangle.

pairs_or_triads.dynamic: Blood or legitimacy rivalry; public war over who the world believes.
Contractual heat turning into trust risk; mutual use then mutual exposure.
Cold parallel interests—Celia tries to capture narrative; Adrian buys evidence paths.

phase_shifts.what_shifts: Nora proves she can win in public without full reveal; Celia escalates social attacks.
Hidden evidence partiality triggers betrayal beat; alliance fractures then reframes stakes.
Truth becomes undeniable in spectacle; Celia's legitimacy engine breaks.
